title: Plum cake
ingredients: Enough milk to fill measuring cup to 1 cup line
1 cup sliced fresh plums (can also use berries)
instructions: Sift together first 4 dry ingredients. Break egg into measuring cup and beat slightly. Add enough milk to the 1 cup line. Add egg/milk mixture with oil to dry ingredients. Mix well. Put batter into lightly greased 13x9 inch pan. Layer fruit in rows, sprinkle with sugar. Bake at 375 degrees for 35-40 minutes. Serve warm or cold. Yummy served warm with ice cream.
This is a very old recipe from my great-grandmother. My grandma would make this frequently in the summer when fruit was freshly picked.
